item.title:
Trade a basket of assets with leverage, no expiry, no market hours.
ETF Perps are live on @BinanceF...
item.description:
Trade a basket of assets with leverage, no expiry, no market hours.
ETF Perps are live on @BinanceFutures, trade SPY, QQQ, EWY, EWJ around the clock, 24/7.
TradFi just got crypto-native.
👉 https://t.co/4ePuKbrelG https://t.co/Fmqhl13Hid
--- @binance | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 1 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
item.author: @binance

item.title: Designing an end-to-end #Technology workforce for the #AI-first era by Henning Soller Mike Stefanell...

#ArtificialIntelligence #MachineLearning #ML https://t.co/U4DDk6ODAe
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 1 | 💬 1 | 👁 38
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title: RT @ying11231: @lmsysorg @ant_group @ollama The real OSS is the friends we made along the way.🫶
item.author: @ollama

item.title:
“Always keep a separate backup.” For sure, every experienced programmer should know this.
𝘉𝘶𝘵 𝘸𝘦 𝘫𝘶...
item.description:
“Always keep a separate backup.” For sure, every experienced programmer should know this.
𝘉𝘶𝘵 𝘸𝘦 𝘫𝘶𝘴𝘵 𝘤𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘢 𝘸𝘩𝘰𝘭𝘦 𝘨𝘦𝘯𝘦𝘳𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘰𝘯 𝘰𝘧 𝘷𝘪𝘣𝘦 𝘤𝘰𝘥𝘦𝘳𝘴 𝘸𝘩𝘰 𝘥𝘰𝘯’𝘵.
And we now have a legion of synthetic coding agents (like Cursor) that also apparently don’t always follow this basic principle, either.
𝗪𝗵𝗶𝗰𝗵 𝗶𝘀 *𝗲𝘅𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗹𝘆* 𝘄𝗵𝘆 𝘄𝗲 𝘀𝗵𝗼𝘂𝗹𝗱 𝗻𝗼𝘁 𝘁𝗿𝘂𝘀𝘁 𝗰𝗼𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀.
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 20 | 🔁 3 | 💬 4 | 👁 1716
item.author: @GaryMarcus

item.title: RT @petergyang: "I shipped 9 failed products before one took off...now I'm doing $1M+/month.&qu...
